mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_base (id, name, description, doc_type, chunk_strategy_json, search_strategy, doc_count, owner_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{docType}, #{chunkStrategyJson}, #{searchStrategy}, #{docCount}, #{ownerId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_base SET doc_count = doc_count + #{delta}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM knowledge_base WHERE id IN #{id}
